query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `academy_content` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`authorId` int,
	`title` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(200),
	`excerpt` text,
	`content` text,
	`contentType` enum('artigo','video','tutorial','curso','podcast') NOT NULL,
	`category` enum('historia','tecnica','instrumentos','composicao','producao','carreira','negocios','cultura') NOT NULL,
	`level` enum('iniciante','intermediario','avancado') DEFAULT 'iniciante',
	`thumbnailUrl` text,
	`videoUrl` text,
	`duration` int,
	`isPremium` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`price` decimal(10,2),
	`tags` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`isPublished` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`viewCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`likeCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`publishedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `academy_content_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `academy_content_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `academy_purchases` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`contentId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`price` decimal(10,2),
	`stripePaymentIntentId` varchar(200),
	`status` enum('pending','completed','refunded') DEFAULT 'pending',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `academy_purchases_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `admin_logs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`adminId` int NOT NULL,
	`action` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`entityType` varchar(50),
	`entityId` int,
	`details` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `admin_logs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `financial_records` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('receita','custo') NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL,
	`currency` varchar(3) DEFAULT 'BRL',
	`referenceId` varchar(200),
	`referenceType` varchar(50),
	`isProjected` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`recordedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `financial_records_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `generated_images` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`prompt` text NOT NULL,
	`imageUrl` text NOT NULL,
	`purpose` enum('perfil','oferta','evento','banner','outro') DEFAULT 'outro',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `generated_images_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
	`message` text,
	`link` text,
	`isRead` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `offering_interests` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`offeringId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`message` text,
	`status` enum('pending','contacted','closed') DEFAULT 'pending',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `offering_interests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `offerings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`profileId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`category` enum('show','aula','producao','instrumento_novo','instrumento_usado','artesanato','acessorio','audiovisual','luthieria','estudio','servico','outro') NOT NULL,
	`priceType` enum('fixo','sob_consulta','gratuito','a_combinar') DEFAULT 'a_combinar',
	`price` decimal(10,2),
	`currency` varchar(3) DEFAULT 'BRL',
	`imageUrl` text,
	`city` varchar(100),
	`state` varchar(2),
	`tags` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`isPremium` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`status` enum('pending','active','rejected','expired') DEFAULT 'pending',
	`viewCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`interestCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`expiresAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `offerings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `opportunities` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`profileId` int,
	`title` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`category` enum('vaga_grupo','show','evento','projeto','aula','producao','estudio','servico','outro') NOT NULL,
	`requiredType` enum('artista_solo','grupo_banda','comunidade_roda','produtor','estudio','professor','loja','luthier','contratante','qualquer') DEFAULT 'qualquer',
	`city` varchar(100),
	`state` varchar(2),
	`budgetMin` decimal(10,2),
	`budgetMax` decimal(10,2),
	`tags` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`status` enum('pending','active','rejected','closed') DEFAULT 'pending',
	`applicationCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`viewCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`deadline` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `opportunities_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `opportunity_applications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`opportunityId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`profileId` int,
	`coverLetter` text,
	`status` enum('pending','viewed','shortlisted','rejected','accepted') DEFAULT 'pending',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `opportunity_applications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `platform_metrics` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`date` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	`totalUsers` int DEFAULT 0,
	`newUsers` int DEFAULT 0,
	`totalProfiles` int DEFAULT 0,
	`totalOfferings` int DEFAULT 0,
	`totalOpportunities` int DEFAULT 0,
	`totalApplications` int DEFAULT 0,
	`totalBookings` int DEFAULT 0,
	`totalRevenue` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`activeUsers` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `platform_metrics_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `portfolio_items` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`profileId` int NOT NULL,
	`mediaType` enum('image','video','audio') NOT NULL,
	`url` text NOT NULL,
	`thumbnailUrl` text,
	`title` varchar(200),
	`description` text,
	`sortOrder` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `portfolio_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `profiles` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(120),
	`profileType` enum('artista_solo','grupo_banda','comunidade_roda','produtor','estudio','professor','loja','luthier','contratante','parceiro') NOT NULL,
	`displayName` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
	`bio` text,
	`avatarUrl` text,
	`coverUrl` text,
	`city` varchar(100),
	`state` varchar(2),
	`lat` decimal(10,7),
	`lng` decimal(10,7),
	`phone` varchar(30),
	`website` text,
	`instagramUrl` text,
	`youtubeUrl` text,
	`spotifyUrl` text,
	`facebookUrl` text,
	`tiktokUrl` text,
	`specialties` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`instruments` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`genres` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`tags` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`isVerified` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`isFeatured` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`viewCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`status` enum('pending','active','suspended') DEFAULT 'active',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `profiles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `profiles_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `studio_bookings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`studioId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`startAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`endAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`totalHours` decimal(5,2),
	`totalPrice` decimal(10,2),
	`notes` text,
	`status` enum('pending','confirmed','cancelled','completed') DEFAULT 'pending',
	`stripePaymentIntentId` varchar(200),
	`paidAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `studio_bookings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `studios` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`profileId` int,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(120),
	`description` text,
	`imageUrl` text,
	`coverUrl` text,
	`city` varchar(100),
	`state` varchar(2),
	`address` text,
	`lat` decimal(10,7),
	`lng` decimal(10,7),
	`phone` varchar(30),
	`email` varchar(320),
	`website` text,
	`instagramUrl` text,
	`studioType` enum('gravacao','ensaio','ambos') DEFAULT 'ambos',
	`equipment` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`amenities` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`pricePerHour` decimal(10,2),
	`pricePerDay` decimal(10,2),
	`capacity` int,
	`isVerified` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`status` enum('pending','active','suspended') DEFAULT 'active',
	`rating` decimal(3,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`reviewCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `studios_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `studios_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`plan` enum('basico','profissional','premium') DEFAULT 'basico',
	`stripeSubscriptionId` varchar(200),
	`stripeCustomerId` varchar(200),
	`status` enum('active','cancelled','past_due','trialing') DEFAULT 'active',
	`currentPeriodStart` timestamp,
	`currentPeriodEnd` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `subscriptions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
